author: cskiraly
content:
Continuing on the discv5 migration, I've updated the tracker (https://notes.ethereum.org/@cskiraly/el-discovery-v5-tracker) but I need some input:
- <@&836981603216654336>: do you have discv5 support now?
- Ethrex <@391214735011479595> you pass the hive tests so I guess you have support, but please update the tracker.

Speaking of Hive tests .... I've now fixed the test harness ~~to make Geth pass ~~ 🙂 to correctly handle FindNode. Congrats to EthRex for passing all the tests. For the others, there seems to be some room for improvement. Please check what fails and why, and lets discuss. We could also schedule a meeting for this, if there is interest.

author: cskiraly
content:
The picture above is quite red, but note that the status with discv4 tests is not significantly better. I'm planning to review discv4 tests to see if there are some that need to be migrated to the disc5 test suite.

We should also discuss sunsetting discv4, but lets first make sure discv5 is well covered.

author: gtrintinalia
content: Yes, but it is under `--Xv5-discovery-enabled` flag. cc <@991090153885941761>
